name: BrainstemFork
summary: Fork the global RAPP brainstem kernel into a project-specific instance. Copies brainstem.py verbatim, picks a free port, inherits Copilot auth, preserves the project's soul.md and agents, and emits a projectTrackerData-shaped JSON sidecar.
tagline: One call: fork the brainstem, register the project, hand back a tracker-import JSON.
egg_note: No pre-populated state .egg shipped — BrainstemFork is stateless per call. The per-machine projects.json registry is written at ~/.brainstem/projects.json on first fork.
